approval_statement: I, edithatogo, approve bounded pilot attachment stderr content-review request SHA-256 53154fc6bed37aaa26d9291bb74ddcb25a7a23c892d7b340fd28415e41defd9a as committed in 26f2e159b26455843ef3b9522e75daef1d0bc7a2. I authorize one local review and classification of the two exact 198-byte stderr files pinned by that request in /private/tmp/.foio-attachment-diagnostic-zdnisebu. The review output must be metadata-only and must not reproduce verbatim stderr. This does not authorize derived-text review, derivation retry, context presentation, analyst execution, reconciliation, empirical claims, population inference, archive-wide claims, human-reviewed claims, gold promotion, legal certification, redistribution, publication, training, fine-tuning, release, dataset publication, or paper updates.
